name: Mysterious Guard
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>聖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>なる<ruby lang="jp"><rb>守</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>まも</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>り<ruby lang="jp"><rb>手</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>て</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: FLIP: Target 1 face-up monster on the field, and if you control a Warrior monster, you can target 1 additional face-up monster on the field; place the first target on top of the Deck, then return the additional target (if any) to the hand if you still control a Warrior monster.
mnst_eff: FLIP: Target 1 face-up monster on the field, and if you control a Warrior monster, you can target 1 additional face-up monster on the field; place the first target on top of the Deck, then return the additional target (if any) to the hand if you still control a Warrior monster.
eff: FLIP: Target 1 face-up monster on the field, and if you control a Warrior monster, you can target 1 additional face-up monster on the field; place the first target on top of the Deck, then return the additional target (if any) to the hand if you still control a Warrior monster.

action: Places cards from the player's field on the top of the Deck
Places cards from the opponent's field on the top of the Deck
